name: Cornerstone OnDemand Learning & Talent API
what_it_does: Cornerstone OnDemand REST API for unified learning and talent management platform. Enables AI agents to manage learning content and course catalog administration, handle training assignment and completion tracking, access compliance training management and certification workflows, retrieve performance management and goal tracking data, manage succession planning and talent pool data, handle recruiting and applicant tracking integration, access workforce analytics and skills gap reporting, retrieve learning analytics and completion reports, manage user provisioning and organizational hierarchy, and integrate talent and learning data with HRIS, ERP, and workforce planning systems.
use_cases: Automating compliance training assignment from HR compliance agents
Tracking learning completion and certification from workforce development agents
Managing talent succession pipeline from people ops agents
Integrating learning data with HRIS from HR analytics agents
not_for: Simple LMS without enterprise talent management and succession planning
Consumer education platforms without corporate compliance training context
SMB training without enterprise licensing requirements
best_when: A large enterprise using Cornerstone OnDemand wants AI agents to automate compliance training workflows, learning assignment, completion tracking, performance management, and succession planning.
avoid_when: COMPLIANCE RISK: Automated compliance training assignment must account for regulatory deadlines — late or missed mandatory training (OSHA, harassment prevention) creates legal liability. Skills gap automation and succession decisions require human review for EEOC compliance.

auth.notes: Cornerstone uses OAuth 2.0 for REST API access. Corporate credentials with learning, performance, and talent scopes. Developer portal at developer.csod.com. Webhooks for training completion and talent events. SCORM and xAPI for learning content. HRIS integrations with SAP SuccessFactors, Workday, and ADP.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per user annual subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual enterprise subscription per active user; module-based for learning, performance, succession
pricing.notes: Santa Monica, California. Founded 1999. CSOD. Talent and learning management. Acquired by Clearlake Capital (2022, $5.2B). 7,000+ customers, 100M+ users globally. Strong enterprise compliance training and succession planning. Saba acquisition (2020) expanded learning platform. Competes with SAP SuccessFactors and Workday for enterprise talent management.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth application; bulk reporting APIs for large exports

known_agent_gotchas: COMPLIANCE RISK: Mandatory training deadline automation must track regulatory due dates; missed compliance training is legal liability
Complex data model — Cornerstone's unified talent model spans learning, performance, recruiting; understand module dependencies
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API via developer portal requiring enterprise account
Clearlake acquisition — verify API roadmap continuity under private equity ownership
SCORM/xAPI for content — learning content delivery uses SCORM/xAPI standards separate from REST API
High latency for complex reports — talent and succession reports can take seconds; implement async polling
agent_readiness.security_notes: Talent and learning management. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, FedRAMP. OAuth2. Multi-region. Employee talent, learning, and succession data.

security_score_components.security_notes: LMS and talent management. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, FedRAMP. OAuth2. Multi-region. Employee learning and talent data.
